home.heroTitle: Premium catering for weddings, business events, and private occasions.
home.heroSubtitle: Speisely helps you discover caterers, plan your event, and continue through a clearer, more premium booking journey.
home.guided.label: Guided event planning
home.guided.title: Tell us about your event
home.guided.subtitle: Start with your event type, guest count, city, and budget. Continue into a structured request flow and discover relevant caterers.
home.guided.preferencesValue: Cuisine, dietary needs, service style, extra services
home.why.label: Why Speisely
home.why.title: A stronger product experience than a simple caterer list.
home.why.subtitle: Speisely should feel premium, guided, and useful from the first click. The website introduces the brand, and the product flow helps users move naturally into planning their event.
home.highlight1.title: Curated Caterers
home.highlight1.desc: Browse selected providers for weddings, corporate events, family celebrations, and premium private occasions.
home.highlight2.title: Smart Event Matching
home.highlight2.desc: Tell us about your event and continue into a guided request flow designed to help you discover suitable caterers.
home.highlight3.title: Flexible for Every Occasion
home.highlight3.desc: From buffet and finger food to plated menus and full-service staffing, Speisely supports different event formats.
home.highlight4.title: One Clear Journey
home.highlight4.desc: Start on the website, explore caterers, submit your request, and continue seamlessly into your dashboard.
home.occasions.label: Occasion-based discovery
home.occasions.title: Explore catering by occasion
home.occasions.weddingDesc: Elegant catering for celebrations, receptions, and full-day events.
home.occasions.corporateDesc: Modern catering for office gatherings, conferences, launches, and team events.
home.occasions.privateDesc: Flexible menus for birthdays, anniversaries, family dinners, and celebrations.
home.occasions.ramadanDesc: Event-ready options for community dinners, family gatherings, and special evenings.
home.steps.label: How it works
home.steps.title: A cleaner path from discovery to event planning
home.steps.subtitle: Instead of throwing users into a confusing marketplace, Speisely can guide them into the right next step.
home.steps.step1Desc: Share the event type, guest count, location, budget, and preferences.
home.steps.step2Desc: Browse profiles and continue into a request flow that helps you find relevant options.
home.steps.step3Desc: Review your request, explore caterers, and continue your journey through the dashboard.
home.footerTagline: Premium catering marketplace for modern event planning.
